review: Absolutely incredible! The chole is rich and spicy and the bhatura is perfectly puffed. One of the best in Old Delhi.
Great taste, very authentic. The chole has a wonderful depth of flavor. A must try when in Delhi.
Good bhature but the chole could be spicier. Still a solid choice for breakfast.
Decent and affordable. Not the best in Delhi but good for the price.
The aloo tikki here is crispy on the outside and soft inside. The chutneys are amazing!
Freshly made and piping hot. The tamarind chutney is the perfect complement.
Good but sometimes the oil seems old. Taste is acceptable but could be better.
Best pani puri in Chandni Chowk! The water is perfectly tangy and the filling is generous.
Refreshing and tasty. Always a queue but worth the wait.
Decent pani puri. Nothing extraordinary but satisfying.
This is legendary! Over 150 years old and still serving the most amazing stuffed parathas. Absolutely divine.
Great variety of stuffings. The paneer paratha is outstanding. Very affordable.
Good parathas but slightly overpriced for the location. Still tasty.
The original kulfi falooda. Creamy, dense and perfectly sweet. A Delhi institution.
Rich and flavorful kulfi. The falooda adds a wonderful texture.
Good kulfi but melts quickly. Still tasty and affordable.
Fresh hot jalebis made right in front of you! Crispy, syrupy and absolutely delicious.
Standard but good quality jalebi. Always fresh in the mornings.
The dahi bhalle here are exceptional. Light, fluffy and topped with perfectly balanced chutneys.
Tasty chaat with generous toppings. Gets very crowded in evenings.
THE best vada pav in Mumbai. The garlic chutney is absolutely legendary. A Mumbai icon.
Crispy vada with the most amazing dry garlic chutney. Cannot visit Mumbai without trying this!
Classic Mumbai street food done right. Spicy, crispy and filling.
Good vada pav but the chutney could be better. Decent for the price.
Average vada pav. Gets the job done but nothing special.
Butter-loaded pav bhaji that is absolutely divine. The bhaji is thick, spicy and perfectly balanced. Queue is long but worth it.
Legendary pav bhaji. Generous with butter and the taste is incredible. Must-visit at Juhu Beach.
Good pav bhaji with lots of butter. The pav is always perfectly toasted.
Decent pav bhaji but the bhaji is a bit thin. Good for budget students.
The bhel puri here is a masterpiece! Perfect balance of crunch, tang and spice.
Great bhel puri enjoyed with a sea view! The tamarind chutney is exceptional.
Classic Chowpatty bhel puri. Good but sometimes gets soggy if you wait too long.
These little delights burst with flavor! The curd is fresh and the chutneys are perfect.
Excellent dahi puri. The filling is generous and the flavors are well-balanced.
The spiciest and most flavorful misal in Thane! Addictive and absolutely amazing.
Authentic Maharashtrian misal pav. The usal gravy is outstanding.
Good misal pav. A bit less spicy but still tasty.
The original Frankie! Perfectly spiced filling in a soft roll. So satisfying.
Great pani puri with a perfect view of the beach. The water is just right.
The original kathi roll birthplace. Egg and mutton rolls are absolutely divine. A Kolkata legend.
Incredibly flavorful rolls with tender meat and perfectly caramelized onions.
Famous for their egg chicken roll. The coating is perfectly spiced.
Good kathi rolls but in a less touristy area. Authentic taste.
The best puchka in Kolkata! The filling is flavorful and the water is perfectly tangy.
Excellent puchka. Always fresh and perfectly balanced.
Good puchka. The tamarind water is particularly good here.
Amazing jhal muri! The mustard oil and green chili give it the perfect kick.
Great jhal muri. Very fast service and always fresh.
Legendary mishti doi! Perfectly sweetened, dense and creamy. A Kolkata treasure.
Exceptional mishti doi. The clay pot keeps it perfectly cool.
Good mishti doi but slightly less sweet than I prefer. Still excellent quality.
The egg roll here is perfectly cooked with amazing spices. Always fresh.
Great egg roll. The egg layer is perfectly done.
Wonderful steamed momos from Kolkata's Chinatown. Authentic and delicious.
Unique street snack with broken puris and spicy chutneys. Very addictive!
The softest idlis you will ever eat! The sambhar and chutneys are out of this world. A Chennai classic.
Consistently excellent idlis. The coconut chutney is divine.
Famous for the thicker variety of idli. The sambhar is deeply flavorful with tamarind.
Good idli but the sambhar is a bit watery. Still a solid breakfast option.
Perfectly crisp on the outside and fluffy inside. The masala filling is incredible.
Legendary dosas. Wide variety and always consistently good.
Excellent crispy dosa. The sambhar that comes with it is outstanding.
Perfectly spiced boiled chickpeas at Marina Beach. The coconut garnish is perfect.
Good sundal. A healthy and satisfying beach snack.
The crispiest and most flavorful murukku! Made fresh daily.
Good murukku with various flavors. The pepper variety is exceptional.
Hot and crispy vegetable bajjis! Perfect evening snack.
Classic beach bajji. Onion and banana bajji are the best.
Perfect South Indian filter coffee! Strong, aromatic and perfectly sweet. A morning ritual.
Amazing filter coffee with the perfect decoction to milk ratio.
Exceptional filter coffee. The frothy top is perfectly done.
The legendary Paradise biryani! Rich, aromatic and perfectly spiced. Each grain of rice is perfectly cooked.
Excellent biryani with perfect meat to rice ratio. The dum cooking technique is evident.
One of the best biryanis in the city! The meat is fall-off-the-bone tender.
Consistently good biryani. The salan and raita accompaniments are excellent.
Good biryani but slightly less spicy. Good for those who prefer milder flavors.
Wonderful Hyderabadi dum biryani. The aroma is incredible.
Best pani puri in Hyderabad! The water is incredibly flavorful and the filling is generous.
Legendary chat stall! Always fresh and the mint water is perfectly balanced.
Great pani puri. The tamarind version is particularly good.
The finest haleem you will ever taste. Rich, slow-cooked and absolutely divine. A Hyderabad specialty.
Exceptional haleem. The caramelized onions and fresh coriander garnish make it perfect.
Very good haleem. Slightly less rich but still excellent.
The most authentic Irani chai in Hyderabad! Creamy, slightly sweet and utterly perfect with Osmania biscuits.
Amazing Irani chai. The biscuits are the perfect accompaniment.
Good Irani chai. Slightly less creamy but great taste.
Best shawarma in the city! The pita is fresh, the meat is well-seasoned and the garlic sauce is incredible.
Excellent shawarma with generous portions. The pickled vegetables add great depth.
Good shawarma. The chicken tawook version is particularly good.
Huge, perfectly fried mirchi bajji stuffed with onion and peanut masala. Incredibly addictive.
Great mirchi bajji. Not too spicy with perfect coating.
Life-changing misal! The spicy usal and crunchy farsan topping is an explosion of flavors.
Incredibly authentic Puneri misal. Fiery, flavorful and immensely satisfying.
The misal here is legendary. The spice level is properly high and the taste is superb.
Good misal but slightly toned down spice for mass appeal. Still tasty.
The best vada pav in Pune! The dry garlic chutney is incredible.
Great vada pav with perfectly fried vada. Always super fresh.
Popular among students. Quick service and good taste.
Authentic Kutchi dabeli with the perfect sweet and spicy filling. The pomegranate and peanuts are perfect.
Good dabeli. The masala peanuts are particularly good.
Traditional jowar bhakri with white butter and jaggery. Pure Maharashtrian comfort food.
Amazing chaat selection! The sev puri is outstanding.
Excellent pani puri with a unique Pune touch. The filling has a special masala.
Authentic Rajasthani experience! The dal baati is perfectly cooked and the churma is divine.
Excellent dal baati churma at an affordable price. Very generous portions.
Good dal baati. The ghee is generous and the dal is well-spiced.
The most iconic kachori in Jaipur! Flaky, crispy and stuffed with perfectly spiced onion filling.
Excellent kachori. Always fresh and perfectly fried.
Good kachori but slightly smaller than Rawat. Still great taste.
The most beautiful and delicious ghewar! Perfectly sweet and wonderfully textured.
Excellent ghewar with the perfect sweetness level.
Good ghewar but slightly overdone on the syrup. Still tasty.
The most intense and flavorful Rajasthani red mutton curry! Fiery and absolutely spectacular.
Excellent laal maas with perfectly tender meat.
The most amazing masala chai! The blend of spices is perfectly balanced.
Excellent chai with generous spices. Perfect with kachori.
Creamy dense kulfi with perfectly cooked falooda noodles. Incredibly refreshing.
The fluffiest and most flavorful dhokla you will find! The tempering is perfect.
Excellent dhokla. Light, airy and perfectly tangy.
Good dhokla at an affordable price. Always freshly made.
The combination of crispy fafda with hot jalebi is addictive! A perfect Ahmedabad breakfast.
Excellent fafda jalebi. The papaya chatni that comes with it is exceptional.
Good fafda jalebi. The fafda is particularly crispy here.
Unique tomato based curry topped with crispy sev. A Gujarati specialty that is utterly delicious.
Perfect khaman! Soft, spongy and perfectly seasoned.
Incredible Gujarati undhiyu! The mixed vegetable curry is rich with coconut and spices.
Wonderful dal dhokli. Comfort food at its finest.
Melt-in-your-mouth khandvi! The thin gram flour rolls with coconut are exceptional.
The original MTR idli vada! Pillowy soft idlis with perfectly crispy vada. Iconic Bengaluru breakfast.
The most perfect idli vada at an incredibly affordable price. Always a long queue but absolutely worth it.
Another Bengaluru icon! The masala dosa and idli here are exceptional.
The crispiest masala dosa in the city! The potato filling is perfectly spiced.
Legendary masala dosa. The ghee-roasted exterior is perfectly golden.
The best masala dosa in Bengaluru! The batter is fermented to perfection.
Good masala dosa at a very reasonable price. Popular with students.
The most perfect South Indian filter coffee! Strong, creamy and utterly satisfying. Just Rs 20!
Exceptional filter coffee. The perfect complement to their breakfast items.
Good filter coffee with a retro atmosphere. A Bengaluru institution.
The food street at VV Puram has amazing pani puri! Always fresh and flavorful.
Excellent chaat selection on the famous food street.
Soft and slightly sweet buns from the Mangalorean tradition. Excellent with coconut chutney.
The most delicate rice crepes! Paper thin and perfectly cooked with coconut chutney.
The most melt-in-the-mouth kebab ever created! 160 spices go into this masterpiece. A Lucknow legend.
Excellent galouti kebabs. Incredibly soft and flavorful.
Good galouti kebab but not quite the Tunday level. Still exceptional.
Legendary Lucknawi biryani! The aroma alone is intoxicating. Light dum cooked to perfection.
Exceptional biryani. The rice to meat ratio is perfect.
Very good Lucknawi biryani. The subtle spicing is characteristically Awadhi.
The creamiest kulfi in Lucknow! The pistachio kulfi is absolutely divine.
Excellent kulfi falooda. The rose syrup adds a beautiful touch.
The most aromatic and soft saffron-flavored flatbread. Perfect with kebabs.
Good sheermal. Slightly less aromatic than Tunday but still excellent.
Lucknawi chaat is unique! The tamatar chaat and dahi vada are exceptional.
Good chaat. The matar ki chaat is a local specialty not to be missed.
The most magical after-dinner paan! Perfectly prepared with the finest ingredients.
Excellent paan. The meetha paan here is perfectly balanced.
Very average biryani. Lacks the authentic Lucknawi flavor. Not worth the visit.
Thick, rich rabri with saffron and cardamom. Perfect end to a Delhi meal.
Earthy kulad chai that tastes even better in the clay cup. Aromatic and perfectly sweet.
Fresh corn bhel with a Mumbai beachside twist. Tangy, spicy and fresh.
The most satisfying kothu parotta! Shredded and tossed with egg and spices.
Incredible chettinad style crab masala. Spicy and complex flavors.
Crispy green moong dosa with perfect ginger chutney. A unique Hyderabad breakfast item.
Authentic Rajasthani desert beans and berries. A true taste of Rajasthan.
Hot gram flour fritters - crispy outside and soft inside. Best evening snack.
Traditional rice flour roti with coconut. A Karnataka staple done perfectly.
Ethereal winter dessert! Cloud-like sweet cream foam that melts instantly. Magical experience.
Thick, creamy lassi topped with malai. Perfectly sweet and utterly refreshing.
Cooling kokum based digestive drink. Perfect after a heavy meal.
Thick and creamy Kolkata style lassi. Very refreshing in summer.
Cold and creamy lassi - the perfect coolant after spicy biryani.
The iconic Pune thick milkshake topped with ice cream! Rose mastani is heavenly.
Excellent mastani! Thick, creamy and loaded with toppings. A Pune specialty.
